---
pagetitle: "Open Science Initiative in Psychology"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}

<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">LMU</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Open Science Initiative in Psychology</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;" class="m-0">
                The LMU Open Science Initiative in Psychology (OSIP) aims to promote Open Science at the
                Department Psychology and beyond by monitoring international developments, organizing workshops,
                adapting hiring policies and channeling the discussion about standards of research quality
                and transparency. Currently it consists of 40 members including every research unit of the
                department and all status groups from students to full professors. Together with the LMU Open
                Science Center its goal is to improve scientific practices and reproducibility in psychological
                research at LMU and beyond.
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/osip.png" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="OSIP logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!-- Past activity note -->
<div class="alert alert-success text-success" role="alert" style="font-style:italic;">
    OSIP was active from July 2015 to July 2024. Any interested parties wanting support to revive it or support for a one-off event can contact the LMU Open Science Center coordinator, <a href="mailto:malika.ihle@lmu.de" class="text-success">Dr. Malika Ihle</a>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-4">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Resources
    </h4>
    <ul class="list-unstyled mt-0 d-flex flex-column gap-3">
        <li>
            <a href="https://osf.io/mgwk8/" rel="noopener"
               class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 text-decoration-none" style="cursor: pointer; width:fit-content;">
                <img src="https://osf.io/static/img/institutions/shields/cos-shield.png"
                     alt="OSF" class="rounded-3 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                     style="width:56px; height:56px; object-fit:contain; background-color:#e2f0fe; padding:8px;">
                <span>
                    <span class="d-block fw-semibold text-black">OSF Repository</span>
                    <span class="d-block text-muted small">Workshops and meetup materials</span>
                </span>
            </a>
        </li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
     If you are a member of the psychology department and want to join the initiative, do not hesitate 
    to contact us. We gladly welcome all psychologists interested in making research at our department 
    more transparent.
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="mailto:osip@psy.lmu.de" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact OSIP team
        </a>
        <a href="https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/osip" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Join Mailing list
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
```
